description: A law enforcement intelligence analyst with repetitive strain injury (RSI) needs a Talon voice-controlled system for reviewing CCTV footage and dictating logs. Create a 3-file Talon configuration package in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\cctv_logger\. The package must include cctv_logger.py, a Python module using talon (Module, actions) and datetime to define a user.cctv_target list and an action class with methods cctv_log_event(event_text: str) and cctv_insert_target(target_id: str). The logging action must type the current time as [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS] - followed by the event text. The target insertion
